summary: Frontend testing for Alert Center feature on Dashboard. All 16 test cases passed. Login flow works, Dashboard loads without React errors, Alert Center is fully functional with bell icon, title, subtitle, 4 alert category cards, settings panel with 3 configurable inputs, and detail list toggle.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection errors and occasional 500 errors - external dependency, not a code issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Alert Center feature fully tested and working. All 16 test cases passed: login, dashboard load, alert center visibility (bell icon, title, subtitle), 4 alert category cards (Immobilisés, Batterie critique, Sous-utilisés, Tags inactifs), alert badge showing total count, settings panel with 3 configurable inputs (immobilized days, battery %, inactive days), detail list toggle on card click, KPI cards regression, period filters, activity feed, charts, GPS map, bottom alert table, responsive layout. External API (omniyat.is-certified.com) has slow response times (5-15s) and occasional WebSocket errors - this is external dependency, not a code issue.
